modules.name: 连发+破冰+提前-E
modules.code: (function(){ const CONFIG={ TIME_ADVANCE:50, ICE_BREAK_KEY:'e', ESCAPE_DURATION:420, FIRE_RATE:80 }; if(window._macroKeyDownHandler)window.removeEventListener('keydown',window._macroKeyDownHandler,true); if(window._macroKeyUpHandler)window.removeEventListener('keyup',window._macroKeyUpHandler,true); const macroState={isBreaking:false,lastDirKey:null}; const heldKeys=new Set(); const noBackswingState={32:false,70:false}; const fireIntervals={32:null,70:null}; const DIR_MAP={ 87:{name:'上',opposite:83}, 38:{name:'上',opposite:40}, 83:{name:'下',opposite:87}, 40:{name:'下',opposite:38}, 65:{name:'左',opposite:68}, 37:{name:'左',opposite:39}, 68:{name:'右',opposite:65}, 39:{name:'右',opposite:37} }; if(!window._originalPomeloNotify){ window._originalPomeloNotify=window.pomelo.notify; } window.pomelo.notify=function(route,msg){ if(route==="area.playerHandler.sendAction"&&msg&&msg.input){ msg.input.ts=Date.now()-CONFIG.TIME_ADVANCE; } return window._originalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments); }; function fireKey(keyCode){ document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:keyCode,which:keyCode,bubbles:true,cancelable:true})); document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:keyCode,which:keyCode,bubbles:true,cancelable:true})); } window._macroKeyDownHandler=function(e){ if(!e.isTrusted)return; if(e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA')return; const key=e.keyCode; heldKeys.add(key); if(DIR_MAP[key])macroState.lastDirKey=key; if(e.key.toLowerCase()===CONFIG.ICE_BREAK_KEY&&macroState.lastDirKey&&!macroState.isBreaking){ macroState.isBreaking=true; const oppKey=DIR_MAP[macroState.lastDirKey].opposite; document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:macroState.lastDirKey,bubbles:true})); fireKey(32); document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:oppKey,bubbles:true})); setTimeout(()=>{ document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:oppKey,bubbles:true})); macroState.isBreaking=false; heldKeys.forEach(k=>{ if(DIR_MAP[k]){ document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:k,which:k,bubbles:true,cancelable:true})); } }); },CONFIG.ESCAPE_DURATION); } if(key===32||key===70){ if(noBackswingState[key]||e.repeat){ e.stopPropagation(); e.preventDefault(); return; } noBackswingState[key]=true; setTimeout(()=>{ let fakeKeyUp=new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:key,which:key,bubbles:true,cancelable:true}); document.dispatchEvent(fakeKeyUp); },1); clearInterval(fireIntervals[key]); fireIntervals[key]=setInterval(()=>{ if(!macroState.isBreaking)fireKey(key); },CONFIG.FIRE_RATE); } }; window._macroKeyUpHandler=function(e){ if(!e.isTrusted)return; const key=e.keyCode; heldKeys.delete(key); if(key===32||key===70){ noBackswingState[key]=false; clearInterval(fireIntervals[key]); fireIntervals[key]=null; } }; window.addEventListener('blur',()=>{ clearInterval(fireIntervals[32]); clearInterval(fireIntervals[70]); fireIntervals[32]=null; fireIntervals[70]=null; noBackswingState[32]=false; noBackswingState[70]=false; }); window.addEventListener('keydown',window._macroKeyDownHandler,true); window.addEventListener('keyup',window._macroKeyUpHandler,true); console.clear(); console.log("%c✔️ 终极连发+破冰+提前宏 V5.0 注入成功！","color: white; background: #FF4500; font-size: 16px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold;"); console.log("\n👉 时延欺骗："+CONFIG.TIME_ADVANCE+"ms | 连发间隔："+CONFIG.FIRE_RATE+"ms | 破冰键："+CONFIG.ICE_BREAK_KEY.toUpperCase()+" | 反跑："+CONFIG.ESCAPE_DURATION+"ms\n"); })();
